ark-c001-forge-keygen-and-token-claims.notes: Added forge keygen init/rotate, env/json/yaml/shell output, local HS256/HS384/HS512 signing, anon/service_role key emission, richer token mint claims for principal_type, agent_id, workflow_id, scope, tenant/session, and extra JSON claims. Runtime smoke produced anon and service_role JWTs.

ark-c002-forge-auth-sql-role-model.notes: Extended ext-flint-auth SQL with agent/authenticator roles, grants, timeouts, agent helper functions, principal_type/is_service_role helpers, and auth.api_keys table.

ark-c003-gate-api-key-roles-and-trusted-.notes: Gate api_keys now carries role/principal_type metadata, API-key authentication maps principal kind accordingly, browser-like clients are denied for flint_sk_* keys, and the proxy strips client X-Flint-* headers before injecting trusted Flint identity headers.

ark-c004-realtime-principal-metadata-pro.notes: Realtime VerifiedClaims now preserves role, principal_type, agent_id, workflow_id, and scope from verified JWTs; identity tests and dependent app/gateway checks pass.

ark-c005-cross-project-configuration-doc.notes: Added key contract docs to flint-forge, flint-gate, and flint-realtime-fabric.
